The '''Bandits of Ggy-ynt''' were a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] organization<ref name="AIR" /> that originated in<ref name="Planetnamia">{{Planetnamia|other=the Bandits of Ggy-ynt|system=[[Ggy-ynt system/Legends|Ggy-ynt system]]|legends=1}}</ref> the [[Ggy-ynt system/Legends|Ggy-ynt system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Esuain sector/Legends|Esuain sector]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> At some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] pirate [[Twin/Legends|twins]] [[Denuab Venithon|Denuab]] and [[Dorin Venithon|Dorin]]—known as the [[Venithon Twins]]—had been members of the Bandits of Ggy-ynt.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Bandits of Ggy-ynt were first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" />
